candidates.why: This is clearly a COGS-related D&A line, but it appears as a component beneath the selected parent COGS row 'Cost of goods sold' and its amount is part of that total. Adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of goods sold. 'Depreciation in Cost of Sales' appears embedded within that total, so no separate COGS D&A should be added.

candidates.why: This row is not SG&A-related; it belongs to cost of sales/COGS, so it is not applicable to the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A / administrative / overhead / exploration-related D&A row is visible above operating profit. Therefore no separate XSGA D&A should be added.
